caption: A screen recording displays a Google Sheets document titled "TH 5/13 - 2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBA...". The spreadsheet contains a list of names and descriptions of collectibles, including "Paul Jon McNealy," "KEB GRIPPER JR 9/20," "JIM PALMER 14/20," and "GRADED MOUAD Hall of Fame Icons autographs Id# 1 of 1". The layout remains static throughout the sequence, with columns of text on the left and center. A red banner at the bottom of the browser window contains a white call to action that reads, "Hit the subscribe button down below!" next to a "Subscribe" button. Below the browser window, a website banner for "WWW.JAYSCALEBREAKS.COM" is visible. No people are present in the recording, and there are no changes in the visual content or movements across the frames.
